summary: Worked on Japanese client projects covering recruitment and insurance registration systems, with responsibilities across backend development, database updates, CMS support, third-party integration, code quality review, security checks, and production support.

projects.name: Kanyuweb
bullets: Worked on a Japan-focused insurance registration platform that required business accuracy and user-friendly content flow.
Modified and improved the web interface based on client requests from Japan.
Integrated third-party APIs and designed synchronization flows while keeping internal storage lean and maintainable.
Developed and configured a CMS to support the new interface and backend workflow.
Redesigned parts of the database structure from the legacy project to align with the new CMS-driven system.
Implemented frontend and backend features using structured design patterns for maintainability and performance.
Used SonarQube and Burp Suite to maintain code quality and improve security posture.
Applied AI-assisted tools such as ChatGPT and GitHub Copilot to speed up drafting, refactoring, and documentation while keeping final output aligned with team standards.
Worked directly with the team backlog and Git-based branch workflow to manage delivery and collaboration.

meta.label: Team Members
meta.value: Worked with a team of 5, including 1 Project Lead, 3 Developers, and 1 Translator (Comtor).

meta.label: Technologies used
meta.value: PHP, Laravel, JavaScript, jQuery, Node.js, SCSS, MySQL, RESTful APIs (third-party data integration), Vite, SonarQube, Burp Suite, Git, Backlog, AI-assisted development tools (ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot)

projects.name: Mintoku
bullets: Worked on a recruitment platform connecting job seekers with employers, with focus on backend features and operational stability.
Developed and integrated realtime chat and notification functionality using Firebase and Pusher.
Implemented image storage and media handling on AWS S3 for efficient file management.
Used WordPress where required for related website management and customization tasks.
Designed and maintained database structures for performance, scalability, and day-to-day production use.
Provided ongoing support and issue resolution to keep the system stable in production.

meta.label: Team Members
meta.value: Worked with a team of 7, including 1 Project Lead (Tester), 5 Developers, and 1 Translator (Comtor).

meta.label: Technologies used
meta.value: PHP, Node.js, AWS (S3 for image storage), Firebase, Pusher, WordPress (WP), PostgreSQL, RESTful API
